case_title: STAR GLASS CO INC VS VILLOTA JULIE A IND AND DBA MAXIM DRESSMAKING ALTE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VILLOTA JULIE A IND AND DBA MAXIM DRESSMAKING ALTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAR GLASS CO INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VILLOTA JULIE A IND AND DBA MAXIM DRESSMAKING ALTE BUSPOS ISABEL IND AND DBA MAXIM DRESSMAKING ALTERA PASIAN OTTORINO IND AND DBA PACIFIC HEIGHTS DEVELO DISMISSED AS TO ALL DEFTS ON PLT MOTION. SEE FILE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
